title: phyllanthus polyspermus
intro: Phyllanthus polyspermus, also known as Phyllanthus niruri, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and kidney disorders, due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Phyllanthus polyspermus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of jaundice, and support the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
